videos.headline: Highlight: Tennessee outlasts Mississippi State in SEC OT thriller
videos.description: The No. 15 Volunteers get 335 yards passing from QB Joey Aguilar and hold off the Bulldogs in overtime, 41-34, on the road in Starkville.

videos.headline: Josh Heupel relives Vols' game-winning goal-line stand vs. MS State
videos.description: Heupel reflects on Tennessee's QB Joey Aguilar's ability to stay composed and highlights his defense's clutch plays in overtime in a 41-34 victory over the Bulldogs.
